title: ButcheryWeightCalculator
description: Schema for animal butchery weight calculations: live weight inputs, species/class yield curves, and carcass / retail cut / by-product outputs.

context.description: Optional planning context for the butchery run.

plannedAt.description: Timestamp when this butchery plan was generated.

processingDate.description: Target processing date for this batch.

unitSystem.description: Primary unit system used for user-facing values.

notes.description: Free-form notes that might affect yields (season, condition, etc.).

exportToHub.description: If true, shim may create a Hub export payload when familyFundMode is enabled.

animals.description: Animals or animal lots to be processed in this run.

yieldCurves.description: Optional species/class-specific dressing and retail yield curves. If omitted, the calculator falls back to defaults.

storehouseInventory.description: Optional storehouse meat inventory snapshot used for planning targets.

result.description: Butchery weight calculation result. May be omitted in a pure request payload and filled in by the shim.

carcassBreakdown.description: Per-animal or per-lot carcass breakdown, including dressing percentage and primal weights.

retailCutPlan.description: Planned retail cut outputs by animal/lot and cut type.

offalAndByproducts.description: Estimated by-product outputs (organs, bones, fat trim, etc.).

analytics.description: Summary metrics for the entire batch.

totalLiveWeightKg.description: Total live weight of all animals in kilograms.

totalCarcassWeightKg.description: Total chilled carcass weight in kilograms.

totalRetailWeightKg.description: Total planned saleable/usable meat weight in kilograms.

totalByproductWeightKg.description: Total weight of by-products (bones, fat, offal, etc.) in kilograms.

averageDressingPercent.description: Average dressing percentage for the batch (0–100).

averageRetailYieldPercent.description: Average retail yield percentage for the batch (0–100).

headCount.description: Total number of head represented in this plan.

animalInput.description: Single animal or lot entry for butchery planning.

id.description: Unique id for this animal or lot within the calculator context.

lotId.description: Optional lot id if animals are grouped and treated as a single processing batch.

species.description: Species (e.g. cattle, sheep, goat, pig, poultry).

class.description: Class or type (e.g. steer, heifer, lamb, kid, sow, broiler).

displayName.description: Friendly name for UI display (e.g. 'Steer #12', 'Lamb Lot A').

liveWeightKg.description: Measured or estimated live weight per head in kilograms.

liveWeightLb.description: Measured or estimated live weight per head in pounds. If both kg and lb are provided, kg should be considered canonical.

count.description: Number of head in this record (1 for individual animals, >1 for a lot).

role.description: Role for planning (e.g. meat, breeder, cull). Typically 'meat' for butchery runs.

location.description: Barn, pen, or pasture location for reference.

scheduledProcessingDate.description: Target date this animal or lot will be harvested.

notes.description: Free-form notes that might affect yields (body condition, health, season, etc.).

yieldCurve.description: Yield curve for a species/class combination, including dressing percentage, retail yield, and per-cut distributions.

id.description: Unique id for this yield curve.

class.description: Class or type this curve applies to (may be empty for broad species-level defaults).

dressingPercent.description: Expected dressing percentage (live to hot carcass).

retailYieldPercent.description: Expected retail yield percentage (carcass to saleable retail cuts).

cutDistributions.description: Optional per-cut yield distribution as a percent of total retail yield.

percentOfRetail.description: Percent of the retail yield weight that this cut represents.

storehouseMeatInventoryItem.description: Storehouse meat inventory snapshot used to align butchery outputs with inventory needs.

cutKey.description: Cut key used to match with retailCutPlan entries.

onHandUnits.description: Number of packages or units on hand.

unitSizeKg.description: Weight per package in kilograms if applicable.

location.description: Storage location (e.g. freezer A, chest freezer, pantry).

notes.description: Optional notes (older stock, special labels, etc.).

carcassBreakdownEntry.description: Carcass-level yield information for a single animal or lot.

animalId.description: Id of the animal this breakdown relates to.

count.description: Number of head represented in this breakdown entry.

liveWeightKg.description: Total live weight (per head or aggregated depending on count).

carcassHotKg.description: Estimated hot carcass weight in kilograms.

carcassChilledKg.description: Estimated chilled carcass weight in kilograms.

shrinkPercent.description: Percent shrink from hot to chilled carcass.

weightKg.description: Weight of this primal in kilograms.

retailCutPlanEntry.description: Planned retail cut output for a specific cut and animal/lot.

animalId.description: Id of the animal related to this cut plan.

weightKg.description: Planned total weight of this cut in kilograms.

units.description: Number of packages for this cut.

packageLabel.description: Suggested package label text (for label printer integration).

notes.description: Optional notes (e.g. grind leftovers, stew vs roast preference).

byproductEntry.description: By-product output (organs, bones, fat, etc.) for an animal/lot.

animalId.description: Id of the animal related to this by-product entry.

weightKg.description: Estimated weight for this by-product in kilograms.

notes.description: Optional notes about handling or storage.
